message:
fix(ci): populate empty dependency-review.yml workflow

The file was created as a 0-byte placeholder in the initial commit and
never populated, causing "0 jobs" failures. Add standard
dependency-review configuration that triggers on pull_request events.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+name: Dependency Review
+
+on:
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+jobs:
+  dependency-review:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/dependency-review-action@v4
